step2.title: How do you train?
step2.subtitle: Your main discipline defines your plan.
step2.secondaryTitle: Do you combine it with anything else?

step3.title: Your body
step3.subtitle: So your coach can calculate your plan correctly.

veryActive.label: Very active
veryActive.description: Twice a day or physical job

invalidWeight.title: Invalid weight

invalidHeight.title: Invalid height
invalidHeight.body: Enter a height between 100 and 250 cm.

invalidAge.title: Invalid age
invalidAge.body: Enter an age between 12 and 100 years.

step4.title: Your level and style
step4.subtitle: Last step. Your coach will adjust the intensity to this.
step4.modeQuestion: How do you prefer to train?

missingSelection.title: Select both options
missingSelection.body: Choose your level and training mode.

missingData.title: Error
missingData.body: Data from the previous step is missing.

weight_loss.title: Lose weight
weight_loss.description: Lose fat and improve body composition

recomposition.title: Recomposition
recomposition.description: Lose fat and build muscle simultaneously

powerlifting.title: Powerlifting
powerlifting.description: Maximize strength in squat, bench press, and deadlift

sport_specific.title: Sport-specific
sport_specific.description: Performance for your sport or discipline

general_fitness.title: General fitness
general_fitness.description: Improve health, energy, and overall wellbeing

casual.label: Casual
casual.description: I train sporadically or I'm a beginner

intermediate.label: Intermediate
intermediate.description: I've been training regularly for months

intensive.label: Intensive
intensive.description: I train seriously, several times a week

flexible.label: Flexible
flexible.description: I adapt when life gets complicated. I prefer consistency over perfection.

strict.label: Strict
strict.description: I commit 100%. No excuses, no skipping sessions.

gym_strength.label: Strength / Gym
gym_strength.description: Weights, machines, and strength training at the gym

home_calisthenics.label: At home / Calisthenics
home_calisthenics.description: Bodyweight and minimal equipment at home
